author: Paul Paul
content: My wife and I found this place purely by accident when we had a tire blow out. My wife's vegan and the preparation is fantastic. I went for a breakfast roll which was delicious. My wife had soft bean taco's with a helping of cauliflower curry. I tasted my wife's and it was so good I went and got the same with cheese and it was banging. The menus are brilliant catering to eaters of all kinds but for me to enjoy vegetarian food it has to be tasty. I'd eat those bean taco's anytime. The coffee is as good if not better than you any you could get but well priced. The staff are beautiful helpful people and there's a nice courtyard out back. We were staying in St. Ives but we drove to Hayle to eat there every day of our holiday after that. Scrumptious cakes, good ice cream- whatever you need is here. Hope to visit again soon to sample more delicious things. AND all their stuff is recyclable for your take away. Highly recommended Thanks from us both.
